subject: Appointment of the Chief Justice of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario
precis: Appointment of the Honourable Patrick J. Boucher, Regional Senior Judge of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario for the Northeast Region, to be Chief Justice of the Superior Court of Justice of Ontario, and a Judge ex officio of the Court of Appeal for Ontario.
